name: Lime & Cranberry
title: Lime & Cranberry Rum Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Lime & Cranberry Cocktail | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A refreshing two-ingredient highball that combines BACARDÍ Lime Flavoured rum with cranberry juice and a lime wedge garnish.
marketing_description: Serve up the taste of summer year-round with a refreshing BACARDÍ Lime & Cranberry. It’s the tart flavour you crave, now with an irresistible twist of lime zest.

steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour ingredients into the highball glass.

raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Lime & Cranberry 44 ml BACARDÍ Lime Flavoured rum 89 ml cranberry juice Servings Copy Lime & Cranberry ingredients Copied! Lime & Cranberry recipe One step at a time 1 Ice Fill a highball glass with ice. 2 Pour Pour ingredients into the highball glass. 3 Stir Stir well to combine. 4 Garnish Garnish with a lime wedge.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make the best Lime & Cranberry Rum Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ receipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
